docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100025714), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED JAN-28-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, WALTER

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 18057007) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $249.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 18057007) AS TO DEFENDANT DAVIS, WALTER

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-03-2018 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
